name: DMT Fractal Zoom
description: An infinite zoom through a fractal landscape with DMT-vision-like visual complexity enriched by Wolfram Alpha Mandelbrot data. Each zoom level reveals new fractal details. Escape radius |z|>2 guarantees divergence. Smooth coloring uses log(log|z|)/log(2). Colors are extremely saturated rainbow gradients that shift as you zoom. Bass drives zoom speed and iteration count. Mouse warps the complex plane as a Julia set constant. Temporal feedback creates trails during zoom.
